title: calea salmeifolia
intro: Calea salmeifolia is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the Mexican mint or yerba de tago. The medicinal properties of Calea salmeifolia lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. Calea salmeifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
